rule_metadata.name: CIMplant
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'CIMplant' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule CIMplant
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'CIMplant' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "CIMplant"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\%SystemRoot\%\\\\MEMORY\.DMP/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /C\:\\Windows\\MEMORY\.DMP/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
